inputs.label: Side a
inputs.businessContext: Length of side a opposite angle A

inputs.label: Side b
inputs.businessContext: Length of side b opposite angle B

inputs.label: Angle C
inputs.businessContext: Angle between sides a and b (in degrees)

formulas.angle_A: Math.atan2(side_a * Math.sin(angle_C * Math.PI / 180), side_b - side_a * Math.cos(angle_C * Math.PI / 180)) * 180 / Math.PI
formulas.side_c: Math.sqrt(side_a**2 + side_b**2 - 2 * side_a * side_b * Math.cos(angle_C * Math.PI / 180))
